title: Reconcile deterministically and fail closed
description: Automatic reconciliation applies only a documented, independently validated unique strong match; ambiguous or conflicting evidence remains unapplied until explicit owner intent.
target: 100% of automatic exact matches create one confirming link and zero new transactions; 100% of approved statement corrections leave exactly one active statement-derived replacement with attributable supersession, dimension, and invariant-preserving relationship history; 100% of corrections that would invalidate an active transfer/refund apply no financial effect and return review-required; 100% of zero-candidate approved cases create one Statement-only Transaction; 0 ambiguous, conflicting, stale, or unsupported-policy cases apply a link or financial effect; 100% of owner-approved decisions retain actor, reason, statement authority basis, and history.
load_condition: All deterministic policies across matched, zero-candidate, multiple-candidate, conflicting-evidence, stale-projection, replay, void, supersession, and owner-correction cases.
measurement: Automated decision-table conformance and property tests compare candidate projections, submitted basis, Canonical Transaction counts, active evidence cardinality, decision history, and exact actuals before and after each case.
rationale: This is the hard safety gate that prevents statement import from duplicating or guessing financial facts. Supports G10 under C20 and C23.
